title: VISITING EAST CAROLINA FOR THE FIRST TIME!- ECU Campus Reaction/Thoughts + Asking Students Questions
body: ECU is a relatively small campus. What you walked by that you thought looked like the old well is actually the Cupola which was removed from the top of one of the old historical buildings when it was remodeled. Most of the students probably live up on “the hill” or in apartments off campus, so if you stayed on main campus you weren’t likely to encounter many people on a weekend. The students could have been sleeping off their fun from the night before. G-Vegas comes alive at night.
author: @heatherstauffer353

title: VISITING EAST CAROLINA FOR THE FIRST TIME!- ECU Campus Reaction/Thoughts + Asking Students Questions

title: Day in the Life of a Cybersecurity Student

title: Day in the Life of a Cybersecurity Student
body: Idk why everyone feels the need to like insult this guy. He’s being very productive and working quite hard it seems like. College is not easy and there is a ton to learn in computers. Bravo my dude.
author: @UndeadWolf23

title: Day in the Life of a Cybersecurity Student
body:
Hey, Grant.
I'm still in high school, but your video has led me to take decisive action. 4-5 months ago, I started changing my daily routine. I was getting up at 5am, I realized that the day is much longer than it looks. Despite the 8 hour school day. I'm getting better every year, but now I also have some issues with myself, so here I am again, watching this video. It was very difficult for me in this kind of mode, but I could feel the results of my work, even though I was in a constant state of stress. This video, gives me hope that I can also. I have university entrance exams in 10 months, now I have to work twice as hard and keep up with everything. I am not ready to leave my dream of doing offensive security and IoT security. Thanks for your hard work, I will try to become a decent professional.
author: @Kyb3rch3ck

title: Day in the Life of a Cybersecurity Student
body:
As I expected, everyone in this comment section is shitting on him for using windows. Guys, just because you have installed Kali Linux and have run a script written by someone else does not mean you are hacker.
That aside, good work mate Keep it up!

title: Day in the Life of a Cybersecurity Student
body:
I don't know why so many people hate his lifestyle.
He is just showing how it looks like. One video can't explain his entire life perfectly.
I saw alot of youtubers videos like this .
Just chill.
He is doing what he wants.
People are so mean and judgemental 🤨
Also I want to live like that when I go to university.
People are different. Enjoying doesn't mean partying and socialising.
Some people enjoy things like reading and doing what they love🙏🏻
author: @shalemprayerhouse6654

title: Day in the Life of a Cybersecurity Student
body: in this quarantine my routine was to wake up at 3pm, play all day and go to sleep at dawn. This video motivated me, I did a routine of studies, physical and mental exercises, and brought me the interest in learning new things. Thanks.
author: @taffeeswirl

title: Day in the Life of a Cybersecurity Student
body: Idk if you're one hell of a workaholic but if this video actually accurately represents what you do in a day I'm amazed. I'm studying cs in uni and I couldn't even be that productive in my dreams. I need to make time for games and relaxing not running flipping 8 miles and reading.
author: @shoobzy3431

title: ECU Dorm Tour
body: Since admitted student day 2020 has been canceled we are touring the dorms via youtube. We appreciate this video and all of the others.
author: @ahamlet1

title: ECU Dorm Tour
body: Man... This brings back memories. I spent so much time in Scott hall visiting my daughter. She was there as a freshman and sophomore 14' and 15', moving off campus after that... Enjoy your time there, it goes soooo quick!!!
author: @shalonbyrd2850

title: ECU Dorm Tour
body: Aright so this is crazy. I literally stayed in the SAME exact dorm. 122A. We didn't have our beds up like that, but they were in the same exact orientation! I see they haven't changed furniture since 2013-2014 when I was there haha
author: @Kishandarji

title: ECU Dorm Tour
body: I was in 114 c in 1980. It seems the dorm has been upgraded since my day. I thought I saw heating vents. We had radiators and no AC. There was no laundry room either. Had to go to Belk or Aycock for that. That was a great tour. It reminded me about my time at ECU, Go Pirates
author: @stephenmacdonald8353

title: ECU Dorm Tour
body: Ayy I see the Aniger NC shirt! My grandparents live there and I’ll be going up to Aniger in a few days, such a small town not many people know about

title: Hope and Woody Visit ECU #72 - East Carolina University
body: Am going to be a senior in high school this year, and just recently visited East Carolina. I'll agree that it's a safety school, but it is a really cool campus. I thoroughly enjoyed it there. UNC is also a cool place, really good college town vibe. UNC Charlotte is a good one too. Similar academic level as ECU, but right near the city with a gorgeous campus and an amazing tour which is nice.
author: @bigmas34
